title: Remove Operations Manager bio section and replace with gym description

requirements.summary: Remove the entire Operations Manager bio section from the homepage including profile photo, biography text, and phone number display
acceptanceCriteria: The Operations Manager section with profile photo, biography, and phone number is completely removed from the homepage
No visual remnants of the Operations Manager section remain

file_operations.description: Remove the operations manager section that currently displays between the hero section and the ImageGallery component. This includes removing the entire div containing the manager's profile photo (01bd025a3bc2b08a666581b45aee8af2c50810d227.jpg), biography text describing work history and educational background, and the phone number display with icon.

requirements.summary: Create a small section on the homepage featuring a photo of the user and a brief description focused on the gym's facilities, equipment, and services
acceptanceCriteria: A compact section is added to the homepage with the user's photo
The accompanying text describes the gym's facilities, equipment, services, and what makes Bodyshape Fitness unique
The section is concise and gym-focused rather than biographical

file_operations.description: Add a new compact gym description section in the location where the operations manager section was removed. Display the generated owner photo at frontend/public/assets/generated/owner-photo.dim_400x400.png alongside a brief paragraph describing Bodyshape Fitness gym facilities, equipment variety, services offered, and unique attributes. Keep the section small and focused on the gym rather than personal biography. Position this section between the hero area and the ImageGallery component.
